preprocessing.note: Input images must be normalised to [0,1] before passing to any model.

disease_recommendations.Downy mildew: Caused by the oomycete Pseudoperonospora cubensis. Favoured by cool, moist conditions and high humidity.
disease_recommendations.Healthy: No disease detected. The leaf appears healthy and vigorous.
disease_recommendations.Leaf curl disease: Caused by Cucumber Leaf Curl Virus (CuLCV) transmitted by whiteflies (Bemisia tabaci). Spread is rapid in warm, dry conditions.
disease_recommendations.Mosaic virus: Caused by Cucumber Mosaic Virus (CMV) or Watermelon Mosaic Virus (WMV), transmitted by aphids (Aphis gossypii, Myzus persicae).
